notes: Brazilian central bank. Operates PIX — the Brazilian real-time payment system (the world's 2nd-largest RTP by volume after India's UPI). PIX participation rules and security manuals are publicly published by BCB, though some operational specs are restricted to participating institutions.

data.notes: Free download of public manuals from bcb.gov.br; participant operational manuals partially restricted. Launched 2020; processes billions of transactions monthly.
